title: austrostipa velutina
intro: Austrostipa velutina, also known as Woolly Blue Grass, is a perennial grass native to Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system. In herbal preparations, Austrostipa velutina is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to promote relaxation and well-being.
